content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy decision table into table J09B_temp where the tour starts with J09B.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
3. Classify meter reading type. Apply rules: 1. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU". 2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU". 3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty:
    - If True: Use sales customer data table entries.
    - Else: Use net data customer table entries.
8. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B. Use column names: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com, file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
10. Delete temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy decision table into table J09B_temp where the tour starts with J09B.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
3. Classify meter reading type. Apply rules: 1. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU". 2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU". 3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. Check if sales customer data is NOT empty:
    - If True: Use sales customer data table entries.
    - Else: Use net data customer table entries.
8. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B. Use column names: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send email with the CSV file to EVU. Email address: meter.readings@evu.com, file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
10. Delete temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 AND ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09B_joined AS SELECT j.*, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." as MR_Doc_No FROM J09B_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg e ON j.ANLAGE = e.Installation

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09B_joined2 AS SELECT j.*, s.TITLE as SALES_TITLE, s.FORENAME as SALES_FORENAME, s.SURNAME as SALES_SURNAME, s.STREET as SALES_STREET, s.STREETNO as SALES_STREETNO, s.CITY1 as SALES_CITY1, s.CITY2 as SALES_CITY2, s.POST_CODE1 as SALES_POST_CODE1, s.EMAIL as SALES_EMAIL, n.TITLE as NET_TITLE, n.FORENAME as NET_FORENAME, n.SURNAME as NET_SURNAME, n.STREET as NET_STREET, n.STREETNO as NET_STREETNO, n.CITY1 as NET_CITY1, n.CITY2 as NET_CITY2, n.POST_CODE1 as NET_POST_CODE1, n.EMAIL as NET_EMAIL FROM J09B_joined j LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09B_final AS SELECT j."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END as TITLE, CASE WHEN s.FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END as FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END as SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.STREET IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END as STREET, CASE WHEN s.STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END as STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END as CITY1, CASE WHEN s.CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END as CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END as EMAIL FROM J09B_joined j LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09B_final AS SELECT j.MR_Doc_No, j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END as TITLE, CASE WHEN s.FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END as FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END as SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.STREET IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END as STREET, CASE WHEN s.STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END as STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END as CITY1, CASE WHEN s.CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END as CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END as EMAIL FROM J09B_joined j LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR

args.sql_query: SELECT MR_Doc_No as `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final

args.email: Meter reading data for process J09B has been processed and exported.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B has been executed successfully. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:

**Steps Completed:**

1. ✅ Created temporary table `J09B_temp` with data from `decision_table` where TOUR starts with 'J09B'
2. ✅ Added `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column to the table
3. ✅ Applied classification rules for meter reading type:
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (0 rows affected)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (0 rows affected)
   - Set HAUS with less than 3 EQUNR to "KSA" (2,216 rows affected)
   - Set remaining rows to "EVU" (2,569 rows affected)
4. ✅ Joined table with `eablg` using ANLAGE = Installation
5. ✅ Joined with `sales_master` and `net_master` tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Applied customer data preference: sales_master data if available, otherwise net_master data
7. ✅ Exported final data to CSV file `J09B.csv` (20,180 rows)
8. ✅ Sent email with CSV attachment to meter.readings@evu.com
9. ✅ Deleted temporary table `J09B_temp`

The process has been completed successfully and the meter reading data has been exported and sent to the EVU email address.
